tezr 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Analysis Examples
    • Getting Started with `tezr`

Package index

Search Functions

Search for theses in the database

search_basic()
Search the Turkiye's National Thesis Center
search_advanced()
Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center
search_detailed()
Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center

Detail Functions

Retrieve detailed information about theses

detail()
Get detailed information about a thesis

Statistics Functions

Get statistics and summaries

stats_subjects()
Get thesis statistics by subject
stats_types()
Get thesis statistics by type
stats_universities()
Get thesis statistics by university
stats_years()
Get thesis statistics by year

Lookup Functions

List available options for search filters

list_disciplines()
List all available disciplines
list_divisions()
List all available divisions
list_institutes()
List all available institutes
list_subjects()
List all available subjects
list_universities()
List all available universities

Cache Functions

Manage the local cache

cache_clear()
Clear the cache
cache_config()
Configure cache behavior
cache_info()
Get cache statistics
